'''âw-v-s''' ('''kawavas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lymphodeplete|lymphodeplete]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lymphodeplete|lymphodeplete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-v-s
|-
! Lemma
| kawavas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwavas|thiwavas]] || [[word:jiwavas|jiwavas]] || [[word:shiwavas|shiwavas]] || [[word:kiwavas|kiwavas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwavas|thuthuwavas]] || [[word:jujuwavas|jujuwavas]] || [[word:shushuwavas|shushuwavas]] || [[word:kukuwavas|kukuwavas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwavas|thuwavas]] || [[word:juwavas|juwavas]] || [[word:shuwavas|shuwavas]] || [[word:kuwavas|kuwavas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwavas|thuwavas]] || [[word:juwavas|juwavas]] || [[word:shuwavas|shuwavas]] || [[word:kuwavas|kuwavas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewavas|thewavas]] || [[word:jewavas|jewavas]] || [[word:shewavas|shewavas]] || [[word:kewavas|kewavas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowavas|thothowavas]] || [[word:jojowavas|jojowavas]] || [[word:shoshowavas|shoshowavas]] || [[word:kokowavas|kokowavas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowavas|thowavas]] || [[word:jowavas|jowavas]] || [[word:showavas|showavas]] || [[word:kowavas|kowavas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowavas|thowavas]] || [[word:jowavas|jowavas]] || [[word:showavas|showavas]] || [[word:kowavas|kowavas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwavas|thĂŠwavas]] || [[word:jĂŠwavas|jĂŠwavas]] || [[word:shĂŠwavas|shĂŠwavas]] || [[word:kĂŠwavas|kĂŠwavas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawavas|thathawavas]] || [[word:jajawavas|jajawavas]] || [[word:shashawavas|shashawavas]] || [[word:kakawavas|kakawavas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawavas|thawavas]] || [[word:jawavas|jawavas]] || [[word:shawavas|shawavas]] || [[word:kawavas|kawavas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawavas|thawavas]] || [[word:jawavas|jawavas]] || [[word:shawavas|shawavas]] || [[word:kawavas|kawavas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawavas|shawavas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawavas|goshawavas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawavas|gokishawavas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawavasnĂŒ|shawavasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawavasnknĂŒ|goshawavasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavasnĂŒ|gokishawavasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawavashĂ«|shawavashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawavasnkshĂ«|goshawavasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawavashĂ«|gokishawavashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavasro|shawavasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavasnkro|goshawavasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavasro|gokishawavasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavasmu|shawavasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavasnkmu|goshawavasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavasmu|gokishawavasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawavasher|shawavasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawavasnksher|goshawavasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawavasher|gokishawavasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawavasng|shawavasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawavasnkng|goshawavasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawavasng|gokishawavasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawavasya|shawavasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawavasnkya|goshawavasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawavasya|gokishawavasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawavasyam|shawavasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawavasnkyam|goshawavasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawavasyam|gokishawavasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavasnĂŒshĂ«|shawavasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawavasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawavasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavasnĂŒro|shawavasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavasnknĂŒro|goshawavasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavasnĂŒro|gokishawavasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavasnĂŒmu|shawavasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavasnknĂŒmu|goshawavasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavasnĂŒmu|gokishawavasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavashĂ«nĂŒ|shawavashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawavasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawavashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavashĂ«ro|shawavashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavasnkshĂ«ro|goshawavasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavashĂ«ro|gokishawavashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavashĂ«mu|shawavashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavasnkshĂ«mu|goshawavasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavashĂ«mu|gokishawavashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavasronĂŒ|shawavasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavasnkronĂŒ|goshawavasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavasronĂŒ|gokishawavasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavasroshĂ«|shawavasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavasnkroshĂ«|goshawavasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavasroshĂ«|gokishawavasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavasromu|shawavasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavasnkromu|goshawavasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavasromu|gokishawavasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavasmunĂŒ|shawavasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavasnkmunĂŒ|goshawavasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavasmunĂŒ|gokishawavasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavasmushĂ«|shawavasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavasnkmushĂ«|goshawavasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavasmushĂ«|gokishawavasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavasmuro|shawavasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavasnkmuro|goshawavasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavasmuro|gokishawavasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
